source_pr.title: test: fix a bug for leak check
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix a bug for leak check that failed to find leaked go routines and fix a bug in ddl test forgot to close mvccStore thast cause routine leak.


### What is changed and how it works?
In the current leak check implement, `checkLeakAfterTest` will init the global variable `beforeTestGoroutines` if it is empty. In the common case, if we call `BeforeTest` explicitly, it's likely to be empty, then after TestT, we call `checkLeakAfterTest`, `beforeTestGoroutines` would be inited again, thus leaked go routines will be added in it, thus failed to be found.

BTW, as the executor test case `TestVectorizedMergeJoin` is too slow, I reorganized executor test suites so the build time can reduce about 20 seconds.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test
 - Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
 - No code

Code changes

Side effects

Related changes

symptoms: PR body mentions leak check "failed to find leaked go routines" and a ddl test "forgot to close mvccStore" causing goroutine leak.
failure_signature: PR body mentions leak check "failed to find leaked go routines" and a ddl test "forgot to close mvccStore" causing goroutine leak.
fix_pattern: test: fix a bug for leak check

evidence: evidence: PR body mentions leak check "failed to find leaked go routines" and a ddl test "forgot to close mvccStore" causing goroutine leak.
evidence: diff adds mvccStore.Close() via defer to avoid goroutine/resource leak in ddl test (ddl/serial_test.go).
evidence: diff fixes test leak infra to avoid re-init beforeTestGoroutines after BeforeTest(), using testGoroutinesInited flag (util/testleak/leaktest.go).
